steps.title: Enter the two points
steps.content: The line contains $(0,3)$ and $(7,31)$. In Desmos, enter $x_1=[0,7]$ and $y_1=[3,31]$, then type $y_1\sim m x_1+b$.

steps.title: Read the equation
steps.content: Desmos gives $m=4$ and $b=3$, so the function is $$f(x)=4x+3.$$ This also makes sense by hand: the y-intercept is $3$, and the slope is $\dfrac{31-3}{7-0}=4$.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: Choice C is correct. It passes both point checks: $f(0)=3$ and $f(7)=31$.
